description: 10 African training tiles (10 km x 10 km) to close the training gap for test tile 33NTE_5_1 (Congo basin). Centroids chosen at documented deforestation hotspots where RADD + GLAD-L alerts are dense 2020-2024, so label-fusion (>=2 votes) will yield useful positives. 7 Congo-basin tiles match the test tile's biome; 3 diverse-biome tiles (W. Africa cocoa, Madagascar rainforest, Mozambique miombo) regularize cross-region generalization.

tiles.rationale: REDD+ pilot zone; heavy slash-and-burn 2020-2024; dense RADD coverage
Industrial logging concessions along Congo river
Smallholder cassava + palm-oil expansion; mixed-density GLAD-L alerts
Industrial logging concessions (FSC + non-FSC); continuous RADD activity
Cocoa expansion + artisanal logging; near test tile latitude
Artisanal gold mining roads; high-confidence RADD alerts
Selective logging + poaching roads; shares MGRS belt with test tile
Cocoa-driven deforestation; different biome for regularization
Slash-and-burn on coastal rainforest; distinct spectral signature
Charcoal + agricultural expansion on drier forest biome
